name: Request a city

<!-- e.g. Boston, MA, US -->

<!-- Look up at wikipedia.org/wiki/<city> → open the Tools menu in the right sidebar → "Wikidata item". e.g. Q100 -->

<!-- URL of the city or hauler "what goes where" page. -->

- [ ] No, just signaling demand
